title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, to be blunt, you kids are about to fall to your deaths.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's nothing there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's almost comical, I know... you've come so far to find a morbid finish line ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're just gonna march off the edge like this?! We'll fall if we keep going!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If giving up my arms is the only surefire way to stop them, then so be it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shnk shnk sink

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Guh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GRANDPA OIMO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately... There really is no way to stop this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What is that bastard summers doing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We finally got all of the brats to the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: DAMN IT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GYAA- AAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's hurting you!! Let go, Grandpa OIMO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AAA- A!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: PLEASE FORGIVE ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OIMO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems we really can't do anything while the arrow is around...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's no way to stop the kids!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So we can't save them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You expect me to watch my own child plummet to death?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they fall into the realm of the dead,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't even be able to recover their bodies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those demons are screwing with us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "I... must've done something bad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is divine punishment, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was always told that too... when I got in trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: me too! if only I was a good boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys really think we're gonna die 'cause we were bad?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What!? No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be a good kid from now on, I promise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Save me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm sowway!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I won't do anything bad anymore, ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Sun God pays special attention to Naughty Kids, Y'know!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But like I said, I won this in a duel!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
